name: NadirClaw
desc: Open-source LLM router & AI cost optimizer. Routes simple prompts to cheap/local models, complex ones to premium — automatically. Drop-in OpenAI-compatible pro…
descFull: Open-source LLM router & AI cost optimizer. Routes simple prompts to cheap/local models, complex ones to premium — automatically. Drop-in OpenAI-compatible proxy for Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, OpenClaw. Saves 40-70% on AI API costs. Self-hosted, no middleman.
